issues.description: Rest action is missing target specification for 'this Character and 1 of your {Dressrosa} type Leader or Stage cards' — should Rest both this card and the selected Dressrosa card
Condition should be 'HasCardOnBoard' with filter for {Dressrosa} type Leader or Stage cards, not 'Always'. The effect requires a valid target to exist.
ForceDiscard action missing conditional check — should only execute 'If your opponent has 5 or more cards in their hand'. Condition must gate this action.
TrashFromHand is incorrect — should be 'TrashFromDeck' or similar. Effect says 'trash 2 cards from the top of your deck', not opponent's hand.
Action sequence is wrong — RestSelf should apply to both this Character AND the selected Dressrosa card (2 Rest actions needed)
